title: Basic AIOTs
description: Adds AIOTs - All In One Tools - into the game.
body:
### **This project is abandoned. Consider using [Piercing Paxels](https://modrinth.com/mod/piercingpaxels) instead.** #

Basic AIOTs adds AIOTs from all vanilla materials into the game. AIOT (All In One Tool) is a 5 in 1 package: A sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel and hoe - all in one slot.

**Mod Support:** Basic AIOTs will add AIOTs from Industrial Revolution and Tech Reborn if installed.
